user.title: Aqara M1S Zigbee Router
user.description: Connect to an Aqara M1S Gen 1 converted to a JN5189 Zigbee Router.

init.title: Sound file management
init.description: Upload or delete as many WAV files as needed. This window remains open after every operation; choose Finish and close when done.

upload_sound.title: Upload WAV sound
upload_sound.description: The file is validated and uploaded to /data/musics/music-ch.

rejoin_zigbee.title: Join a different Zigbee coordinator
rejoin_zigbee.description: First enable permit join on the new coordinator. This action permanently clears only the JN5189 Zigbee network context, restarts it and starts Network Steering. The old coordinator entry becomes stale. Linux, Wi-Fi, RGB, lux and sound files are not erased.

data.confirm: I understand and want to clear the current Zigbee network association

error.upload_failed: Upload failed. Verify the WAV format and hub connection.
error.delete_failed: Delete failed. Verify the hub connection.
error.rejoin_confirmation_required: Confirmation is required before clearing the current Zigbee association.
error.rejoin_failed: The JN5189 did not acknowledge the rejoin command. Verify the hub connection and compatible firmware.

abort.no_managed_sounds: No WAV files were found in /data/musics/music-ch.
